sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ مَيَّادُ صُورَةً قَدِيمَةً فِي كِتَابٍ.
sentences.translation: Mayad je pronašla staru fotografiju u knjizi.
sentences.translationEn: Mayad found an old photo in a book.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِيهَا رَجُلٌ يَبْتَسِمُ أَمَامَ بَيْتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Na njoj je bio muškarac koji se smiješi ispred njihove kuće.
sentences.translationEn: It showed a man smiling in front of their house.

sentences.translation: Mayad ga nije znala i pitala je baku.
sentences.translationEn: Mayad did not recognise him and asked her grandmother.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْجَدَّةُ بِدُمُوعٍ: هَذَا جَدُّكِ فِي شَبَابِهِ.
sentences.translation: Baka je rekla sa suzama: Ovo je tvoj djed u mladosti.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother said with tears: This is your grandfather in his youth.

sentences.translation: Sjedile su i pričale o lijepim uspomenama.
sentences.translationEn: They sat and talked about beautiful memories.
